meta.title: AI training for doctors — Cercle IA
meta.description: AI training for doctors: clinical documentation, scientific monitoring, patient communication. Cross-disciplinary approach, medical confidentiality and GDPR covered. Tailored.
meta.ogImageAlt: AI training for doctors — Cercle IA

hero.title: AI training
hero.description: Beyond the medical tool: a concrete, cross-disciplinary approach for doctors in the AI era. Understand what AI actually does, what it does not do, and how to use it with discernment.

rows.label: Who it's for
rows.value: General practitioners, specialists, residents, department heads

rows.label: Format
rows.value: In person, online or hybrid, from 2 hours

situations.title: You are a doctor and you recognise yourself in one of these situations
items: You hear about AI everywhere, but you don't know where to start or what is truly reliable.
"Doctor, I checked on ChatGPT..." — these consultations are becoming uncomfortable and you're looking for how to handle these interactions.
Between consultations, paperwork and scientific monitoring, you're short on time and people are talking about AI as a miracle solution.
Too many tools, no certainty: ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity... which one is reliable? Which one truly respects your patients' confidentiality?
You want to understand, not be swept along: AI will transform medicine, but you refuse to follow the trend blindly.
People are counting on you to guide others: residents, colleagues, students... they are waiting for you to show the way.

pillars.title: This training does not teach you to trust AI
pillars.subtitle: It teaches you to understand what it does, what it does not do, and how to use it concretely in your medical practice, your organisation, your professional development.

items.title: AI without jargon
items.desc: Discover concretely what AI can and cannot do in medicine, without marketing discourse or catastrophism.

items.title: Use cases adapted to your practice
items.desc: Documentation, monitoring, patient communication, practice management: use cases calibrated to your real-world situation.

items.title: Medical responsibility and ethics
items.desc: Understand when to trust AI, when to question it, and always maintain your clinical responsibility.

items.title: Immediate autonomy
items.desc: Leave with proven methods, not a list of features. A posture of judgement you can develop on your own.

items.title: Medical AI: fundamentals and safety
items: Understanding AI models used in healthcare
Identifying risks specific to medical practice
Choosing tools compatible with medical confidentiality

items.title: AI-augmented clinical documentation
items: Writing clinical reports with AI assistance
Using intelligent dictation in your workflow

items.title: Medical research and communications
items: Writing patient summaries and colleague letters
Personalised medical monitoring and automated alerts

pricing.title: Tailored training
pricing.description: Every training is adapted to your context: your specialty, your regulatory constraints, your existing tools. We can deliver in person at your institution or online, from 2 hours.

card.label: Tailored pricing
card.heading: Adapted to your organisation
card.subtitle: Pricing based on duration, number of participants and chosen format.

faq.title: What doctors ask before signing up

items.a: Yes. It is our absolute priority. We teach rigorous anonymisation protocols and the selection of tools compliant with medical and GDPR requirements. No patient data is processed on unsecured servers.

items.q: Can AI make mistakes in medicine?
items.a: Yes, and that is precisely what the training covers in depth. You will learn to identify AI limitations, verify clinical outputs and maintain your medical responsibility.
No. The training is designed for doctors, not IT specialists. Every exercise is grounded in daily clinical reality, without technical jargon.

items.q: Does the training qualify for continuing medical education credits?
items.a: A training certificate is issued. Check with your medical council for recognition as continuing medical education (CME).

ctaFinal.eyebrow: Take back control of your practice
ctaFinal.title: AI training designed for doctors
ctaFinal.description: Individual, practice or institutional training. Contact us for a session tailored to your context.
